signals.npcLine: Market flickers, tech ghosts whisper 'RAVE' fading fast.
signals.questPulse: Scavenge lost RAVE nodes in shadowed districts.
signals.worldFeed: Crypto tides tumble; shadows swell amid cold Fear.
signals.clueEvent: Broken RAVE chip sparks near neon bazaar.

signals.npcLine: SIREN alarm blaring, someone leaks data under Fear’s veil.
signals.questPulse: Intercept encrypted SIREN signal before ops go dark.
signals.worldFeed: SIREN spikes amid net chaos; hackers set traps.
signals.clueEvent: Encrypted SIREN burst detected in grid ##-B.

signals.npcLine: BTC shadows deepen, the core market feels the chill.
signals.questPulse: Trace BTC ghost transactions before they vanish.
signals.worldFeed: BTC circuits flicker as Panic fuels market Fear.
signals.clueEvent: Corrupted BTC ledger fragments found in darknet hub.

signals.npcLine: HYPE pulses weak; underground groups whisper faded roars.
signals.questPulse: Hunt down missing HYPE injectors in abandoned sectors.
signals.worldFeed: HYPE’s glow dims; speculators vanish into the mist.
signals.clueEvent: Discarded HYPE data drive located near scrap yards.

signals.npcLine: OVPP earnings cut short, cyber-mercs tighten their grip.
signals.questPulse: Extract OVPP intel before corp mercs corrupt it.
signals.worldFeed: OVPP shares sink; corridors buzz with silent Fear.
signals.clueEvent: OVPP encrypted message intercepted at neon docks.
